ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2002_01_10:
Let’s have a blast today like always,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2003_01_10:
Alola! You came here to hang out too,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]?
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2101_01_10: Hey, hey! Let me share something with you!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2101_02_10:
There’s more where that came from, so don’t
worry about using it!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2102_01_10:
I’ve got some useful items to share with you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2102_02_10:
You’re good with items,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]—which makes
me wanna give you more stuff!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2103_01_10:
Oh, [Name:PlayerNickname ]! I’ve got a
present for you!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2103_02_10: I’m gonna keep giving you all sorts of stuff!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2103_03_10:
When my gifts make you smile, it makes me
happy, too!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2201_01_10: Hey, hey! What should we talk about?
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2202_01_10:
I’ve got stuff I wanna talk to you about,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2203_01_10:
All right! Let’s have a nice, long chat,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2301_02_10:
I wonder what I can give you in return...
I guess you’ll have to wait and see!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2402_01_10:
Ahhh, that was fun! Let’s talk story again
sometime!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2401_01_10: We talked a lot! That was so much fun!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8201_2401_02_10: Hey, when can we talk again? I can’t wait!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8001_0701_01_10:
Places where lots of people gather are
fun—like at a festival or something!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8001_0701_02_10:
It’d be great if we could chat here over
some snacks!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8002_0701_01_10:
I wonder why I feel so happy when my
friends do something cool.
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8002_0701_02_10: Congratulating them makes me so excited!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8002_0701_03_10:
I wish we had even more friends to
congratulate—and celebrate with!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8003_0701_01_10:
You gotta be brave to tell others
your worries.
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8003_0701_02_10:
So when you told me yours,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]...
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8003_0701_03_10:
I was so happy. It made me feel like you
trusted me!
ch0098_00_hau_salon/8003_0701_04_10:
If you ever wanna talk about something
that’s worrying you, let me know!
